capabilities.typography: preserve source fonts, sizes and direct formatting
capabilities.numbering: copy referenced numbering definitions with collision remapping
capabilities.tables: inventory tables, rows, cells and fixed-height risks
capabilities.images_vml: copy relationship-backed parts and inventory VML/drawings
capabilities.sections: retain canonical template final section geometry
capabilities.fields_links: preserve relationships and disable automatic field updates
capabilities.pdf_ingestion: audit immutable PDFs, validate page-sourced Book IR, and build an editable normalized DOCX
capabilities.explicit_boundaries: select reviewed PDF-normalized pages from explicit hard-page delimiters
